author: anon-59ff128d
content: Fixed silent acceptance of invalid glob patterns in file discovery. Changed discover_files, discover_files_parallel, and discover_files_auto to return io::Result<Vec<PathBuf>> instead of Vec<PathBuf>. Glob override construction errors (from overrides.add() and overrides.build()) are now propagated via a glob_error helper that wraps ignore::Error into io::Error with InvalidInput kind. Updated all three callers: json_mode.rs returns a JSON error response, file_mode.rs and script_mode.rs print to stderr and return Err(1). Added two new tests: invalid_glob_returns_error (verifies [invalid triggers Err) and valid_glob_returns_ok. All 504 workspace tests pass.
